answers: Start on Fiverr or Upwork. Pick one skill (writing, design, coding, video editing), create a strong profile, price low initially to get reviews, then raise rates.
Freelancing tips: always deliver on time, communicate clearly, build a portfolio, ask for reviews, and never undersell your skills long-term.
Best platforms: Fiverr (gig-based), Upwork (project-based), Toptal (premium), Freelancer.com. Choose based on your skill and experience level.
Remote work essentials: reliable internet, a quiet workspace, time management tools (Toggl, Notion), and clear communication with clients.
